title: Add square particle toggle (software renderer style)
description: Software renderer uses square particles, GL uses rounded. Add r_particles cvar to toggle between round (GL default) and square (software style). Square particles are more authentic to the original game. Should default to round but switch to square in Crunchy/Retro presets.

title: Remove oslibs/windows bundled libraries
description: Bundled Windows SDL/codec libraries in oslibs/windows/. May be unnecessary if only building via Nix.
close_reason: Still needed for win64 cross-compilation target

title: Real-time palettization with dithering
description: Requires GL 4.3 renderer rewrite (uhexen2-6wq). Depends on 3D palette LUT, SSBO palette buffer, and postprocess shader with PALETTIZE modes. See Ironwail gl_shaders.h postprocess_fragment_shader for reference implementation. Blocked by uhexen2-6wq.
close_reason: Already implemented as r_softemu palette dithering with Bayer pattern

title: Normal mapping for BSP surfaces
description: Add detail to flat BSP surfaces via generated or supplied normal maps.

title: [bug] Textures dragging/smearing across screen when camera turns
description: Some textures appear to drag or smear across the screen as the camera rotates, instead of staying fixed to their surfaces. Likely a matrix sync issue in the new shader/VBO pipeline — the software matrix stack may not be in sync with the hardware matrix for some draw calls, causing vertices to be projected with a stale MVP.
close_reason: Brute-force matrix sync fix in GL_ImmEnd, pending Phase 10 full removal of hardware matrix stack

title: [bug] Dynamic lighting squares stuck on/off
description: Dynamic lights sometimes fail to turn on/off correctly, leaving square artifacts of bright or dark lighting on surfaces. This is a pre-existing uHexen2 bug that persists in Hexenwail. Reported by Mathuzzz.

title: Decals system (blood, scorch marks)
description: Projected decals on world surfaces for impacts, blood, explosions.

title: Screen-space reflections
description: Water and floor reflections via screen-space raymarching.

title: View bob/roll/kick comfort controls in menu
description: Add menu options for view bobbing intensity, view rolling, and weapon recoil kick. Comfort/motion sickness settings that Ironwail exposes in its Game submenu.

title: Alt-tab support and focus handling
description: Investigate and fix alt-tab behavior - window focus, mouse grab, rendering pause when switching away.
close_reason: Fixed as part of SDL2 migration — SDL_WINDOWEVENT handles focus changes, SDL_SetRelativeMouseMode handles mouse grab properly

title: [bug] SZ_GetSpace overflow on map entry
description: SZ_GetSpace: overflow without allowoverflow set — crash on entering some maps. Likely a message buffer overflow from too many entities, sounds, or particles. May need increased buffer sizes. Reported by Mathuzzz on Windows.
close_reason: Buffer bumped: NET_MAXMESSAGE 16K→32K, MAX_MSGLEN 20K→32K, MAX_DATAGRAM 2K→4K. Needs Windows confirmation.

title: Port h2ded dedicated server to CMake
description: The dedicated server (h2ded) only had a GNU Makefile which was removed in the build system cleanup. It needs a CMake target added to engine/CMakeLists.txt to be buildable again.

title: Screen-space ambient occlusion (SSAO)
description: Post-process depth-based corner/cavity darkening.

title: Shadow mapping for world lights
description: Basic depth shadow maps for static world lights. Toggle.

title: Mod_LoadModel: models/sucwp2p.mdl not found in SoT addon
description: Tester Mathuzzz reports 'unable to find a model Mod_LoadModel: models/sucwp2p.mdl' when running Siege of Tyr (SoT) mod. Known issue across uHexen2 versions - multiple people have reported it. Works fine when launching the mod through the in-game menu but fails when using a direct shortcut. Likely a gamedir/path resolution issue where the mod's search path isn't set up correctly when launched via command-line shortcut vs menu selection. Spoike suggested checking portals installation and -game path.

title: Starting map scrolling sky renders as black texture
description: External skyboxes (6-sided cubemap) work fine. The issue is on demo1 map which uses Hexen2's original scrolling sky texture (not a skybox). The scrolling sky renderer shows black instead of the animated sky texture. Reported by Mathuzzz.
close_reason: Fixed: R_DrawSkyChain now renders scrolling sky when no skybox loaded

title: Weapon keybind UI in menu
description: Allow rebinding weapon keys through the UI instead of console only. Ironwail feature.

title: Game command for runtime mod switching
description: Console command 'game MODNAME' to switch mods on the fly without restarting. Ironwail/QuakeSpasm feature.
close_reason: game <modname> console command: disconnects, switches FS_Gamedir, clears memory, reloads configs

title: [bug] SoT: many missing sounds and models (muckexit, artiup, sunstaff)
description:
Storm Over Thyrion has many missing precaches: sound/fx/muckexit.wav, sound/misc/douse.wav, sound/items/artiup.wav, models/sunstaff.mdl, and others. These cause 'not precached' warnings and may break gameplay.

Additionally, Glyph of the Ancients projectiles are not being thrown from the character — they drop at the player's feet and explode immediately instead of being launched as thrown weapons. This makes them unusable since you can't get away in time.

May need additional pak files or the mod's asset package is incomplete. The glyph throwing issue may be a separate code bug in projectile spawn velocity/origin.

title: Render scale mode for crunchy pixel upscaling
description: Add r_scale cvar (0.25-1.0) to render at lower internal resolution and upscale to window with GL_NEAREST for retro pixel look. Render 3D scene to FBO at scaled resolution, blit to screen. HUD renders at native res. Depends on GLES 3.2 migration.
close_reason: Render scale implemented via r_scale cvar and Display menu

title: Remove gl_affinemodels perspective hack
description: Disables perspective-correct texturing on models. Another 1996 perf hack.
close_reason: Removed in ab60c572f

title: Combine Display and Video menus
description: Display (gamma, render scale, retro mode, etc.) and Video (resolution, fullscreen, MSAA) are separate submenus. Users find this confusing. Combine into one menu or reorganize.
close_reason: Done: Display and Video menus combined into single menu

title: SZ_GetSpace overflow error when loading later maps
close_reason: Zone memory bump from 384KB to 2MB may have resolved this. Reopen if tester reproduces with new build.

title: Add in-game clock/timer display
description: Show elapsed time, real clock, or speedrun timer on the HUD.

title: TrueLightning: smooth Crusader lightning beam
description: Port TrueLightning feature from Quake source ports. Makes lightning beam render client-side or interpolated for smooth animation. Benefits Crusader 4th weapon especially. Reference: Quake source ports like Ironwail/QuakeSpasm implement this.

title: Investigate missing Portal of Praevus ambient sounds (scream1-3.wav)
description: Portal of Praevus maps reference sound/ambience/scream1.wav, scream2.wav, scream3.wav but these files are not in pak3.pak (47MB, 245 files). May be missing from some distributions. Investigate whether these exist in complete retail installs, other paks, or were cut content. Low priority — game plays fine without them.

title: Audit: verify SV_TouchLinks fix (PR #40) still applied
description: Shanjaq PR #40 fixed SV_TouchLinks reference handling. Verify the fix is still correct in current world.c. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/40
close_reason: Audit complete - all PR fixes verified present in current codebase

title: [bug] PimpModel spin/float/glow not respecting per-entity flags
description: PimpModel entities that should only float (not spin) are also rotating. Entities that shouldn't have glow are showing it. The per-entity flag overrides for spin/float/glow aren't being respected. Reported by Mathuzzz.
notes: Investigation: PimpModel mod->flags modification at pr_cmds.c:460-473 is global (shared model struct), not per-entity. One entity calling pimpmodel() with trail/effect flags changes ALL entities sharing that model. Per-entity ex_flags (EF_SPIN/EF_FLOAT/EF_GLOW) work correctly. Fix: store model flags override per-entity in pimp_overrides array.

title: Fog values don't match expected appearance
Mouse-driven UI navigation
description: Allow mouse to control menus, not just keyboard. Ironwail feature. Click menu items, scroll lists.

title: [bug] NOTARGET command does nothing
description: NOTARGET command reported as not working. Code looks correct (host_cmd.c:142-158). Blocked on skill > 2 (Nightmare) and deathmatch. FL_NOTARGET = 128, matches QuakeC constant.hc. Possible causes: user on Nightmare difficulty, mod AI doesn't check FL_NOTARGET, or cmd_source forwarding issue. Need to confirm which mod/skill level this was tested on.
close_reason: Added FL_NOTARGET check to FindMonsterTarget() in all four game variants (h2, hw, portals, siege). Summoned monsters (imp lords, cubes of force) now respect notarget cheat.

title: PBR material support
description: Metallic/roughness workflow for hi-res texture packs.

title: Lightmapped liquid surfaces
description: Apply lightmaps to water/lava/slime surfaces for proper lighting. Ironwail feature (r_litwater).

title: [bug] Severe frame drops looking towards large maps
description: Terrible performance at map start when looking towards the rest of the map. Serious frame drops reported by Mathuzzz on Windows. May be related to missing vis culling, overdraw, or shader inefficiency.
notes: Root cause: per-surface draw calls. Each visible polygon generates ~10 GL calls (VBO orphan+upload, shader bind, uniform upload, draw, unbind). 2000-4000 visible surfaces = 20K-40K GL calls/frame. PVS/frustum culling is correct. Fix: batch surfaces by texture+lightmap into single draw calls (100x reduction). Key files: gl_vbo.c, gl_rsurf.c DrawTextureChains/R_RenderBrushPolyMTex.

title: FOV slider in options menu
description: Add a field of view (FOV) slider to the options/game menu. Allow adjustment from 60-130 degrees with fov_adapt for widescreen.
close_reason: FOV slider added to Game menu, 60-130 range

title: Port bounding box debug rendering from Ironwail
description: Ironwail has bounding box visualization for entities (r_showbboxes). Useful for debugging collision, visibility, and entity placement. Port to Hexenwail.

title: Replace immediate mode GL with vertex buffers
description:
Major renderer rewrite: migrate from GL 1.x immediate mode to GL 4.3 core profile.

## Why
Required for: retro palettization/dithering, compute shader culling, bindless textures, proper MSAA via FBO, order-independent transparency, and all modern rendering features from Ironwail.

## Architecture (based on Ironwail analysis)

### Phase 1: VBO/VAO Foundation
- Replace all glBegin/glEnd with vertex buffer objects
- World geometry (BSP surfaces) → static VBOs built at map load
- Alias models → dynamic VBOs updated per-frame
- Particles → instanced point sprites or quad VBOs
- Sky → VBO quads
- 2D HUD/menu → orthographic VBO quad batch

### Phase 2: Shader Pipeline
- World shader: lightmap × diffuse, fog, dithering (GLSL 430)
- Alias model shader: per-vertex lighting, colormap
- Particle shader: point sprites or instanced quads
- Sky shader: scrolling layers or cubemap
- Postprocess shader: gamma, contrast, palettization, dithering
- Water shader: warp, alpha, lit water

### Phase 3: Modern GL Features
- GL 4.3 core context (remove compatibility profile)
- Uniform Buffer Objects for frame data (view/proj matrix, fog, time)
- Compute shader frustum culling (Ironwail approach)
- 3D palette LUT texture for retro palettization
- SSBO for light data
- Indirect multi-draw for world geometry
- Optional: bindless textures, persistent buffer mapping

### Phase 4: Advanced Effects
- Order-Independent Transparency (weighted blended OIT)
- MSAA via multisampled FBOs
- Retro softemu modes (fine dither, coarse dither, banded)
- Lightmapped liquid surfaces

## Reference
- Ironwail source at /home/josh/tmp/claudedir/ironwail/Quake/
- Key files: gl_shaders.h (all GLSL), gl_shaders.c (program management), gl_rmain.c (render pipeline), r_world.c (BSP rendering), r_alias.c (model rendering)
- Ironwail requires GL 4.3 minimum

## Effort Estimate
Very large — weeks of focused work. Should be done on a dedicated branch.
close_reason: GL 4.3 VBO/shader migration complete — zero immediate mode, zero hardware matrix stack

title: Dynamic cubemap reflections
description: Real-time cubemap reflections for armor, water, metal surfaces.

title: [bug] Console close with ~ key not working
description: Pressing ~ opens the console but doesn't close it — must press Esc instead. Original engine allows ~ to toggle console open/closed. Quality of life issue for mod developers. Reported by Mathuzzz.

title: [bug] Vanilla scrolling sky broken in base game (no mods)
description: The scrolling sky rendering (non-skybox, base Hexen II without mods) is broken. This is the R_DrawSkyChain / EmitBothSkyLayers path for the default scrolling sky texture. Likely broken during the GL_Imm* conversion of gl_warp.c or gl_sky.c.
close_reason: Fixed: sky was using gl_shader_world (lightmap multiply) instead of gl_shader_sky, and EmitSkyPolysMulti was not converted to GL_Imm*

title: [bug] Crash on entering some maps (AllocBlock: full)
description: Entering certain maps causes AllocBlock: full crash. Lightmap allocation running out of 128 blocks. May need to increase MAX_LIGHTMAPS or optimize lightmap packing. Reported by Mathuzzz.
close_reason: MAX_LIGHTMAPS bumped 128→256. Needs Windows confirmation.

title: Increase MAX_EDICTS from 4096
description: Has a FIXME comment. Pimp override table sized to match. Modern engines use 8192+.
close_reason: Increased to 8192 for both hexen2 and hexenworld

title: Lightstyle interpolation
description: Smoothly interpolate between lightstyle values instead of snapping. Makes pulsating/flickering lights smoother.

title: Console transparency/appearance options
description: Add options for console background transparency and brightness, accessible from Interface submenu.

title: Crash when hovering Quit in main menu
description: Game crashes when pointing cursor at Quit option in the main menu. Reported by Mathuzzz (Windows).
notes: Analysis: M_Main_Draw and M_Quit_Draw code paths look correct. Potential causes: (1) missing menudot*.lmp frames, (2) missing gfx/box_*.lmp textures for quit screen, (3) Draw_CachePic calls Sys_Error on missing files. Note: INTRO item (case 5, right above Quit) calls SDL_OpenURL which could cause issues on Windows. Need Windows reproduction to confirm.

title: Add r_alphasort (back-to-front alpha sorting) from Ironwail
description: Ironwail sorts transparent/alpha entities back-to-front before rendering to fix alpha blending artifacts. Port this approach to Hexenwail. Should be enabled by default (like Ironwail). Reference Ironwail source for implementation.

title: [bug] func_door and func_train_mp too bright
description: func_door (bars) and func_train_mp (elevator) entities appear too bright compared to original engine. Not fullbright but noticeably brighter than they should be. Related to brush entity lighting. Reported by Mathuzzz.

title: Modernize keyboard/input handling
description:
Ironwail-style input modernization:
1. SDL_TextInputEvent for console/chat (proper Unicode, keyboard layout, IME)
2. Scancode-based key bindings (layout-independent WASD)
3. Better key names in binding menu
close_reason: SDL_TextInputEvent for console/chat, scancode-based game bindings (WASD works on any layout), Key_CharEvent/Key_SetTextInputMode APIs

title: Investigate brightness/gamma/contrast controls
description: OpenGL renderer is historically the darkest of all Hexen II renderers (confirmed by API comparison video). Current engine reports 'gamma adjustment not available' on some systems. Investigate: SDL3 gamma ramp support, software gamma fallback, relationship between v_gamma cvar and actual display output. The brightness/contrast GLSL post-process may not be sufficient — compare against Rendition Verite and Software renderer brightness levels.

title: Model animation interpolation (lerping)
description: Smooth animation between keyframes for alias models. Ironwail has this. Major visual improvement.

title: Migrate from SDL 1.2 to SDL 2
description: Codebase uses SDL 1.2 which is ancient/unmaintained. patches/sdl2.patch exists but was never fully integrated.
close_reason: Clean SDL2 migration, no compat ifdefs. Video, input, sound, and build system updated.

title: Weapon texture expands/drags when moving
description: When moving, the weapon viewmodel texture appears to expand and drag/stretch slightly. Likely a interpolation or texcoord issue in the weapon rendering path.
close_reason: Fixed: viewentity frac capped at 1.0 to prevent camera/weapon overshoot from extrapolation. Other entities still extrapolate for smooth movement.

title: Elevator sound cuts off before reaching the top
close_reason: Likely a game-level issue — sound emitted from elevator start position, not tracking the moving platform. Would need QuakeC or engine moving-sound-origin support.

title: Add lightmap support for liquid surfaces
description: Liquid surfaces (water, lava, slime) should receive lightmaps instead of being fullbright or uniformly lit. Reference Ironwail/vkQuake implementations.
close_reason: Duplicate of uhexen2-65r

title: Mods menu for quick mod/add-on switching
description: Ironwail-style Mods menu for browsing and launching installed mods without command-line arguments. Scan game directories for mod folders.
close_reason: Mods menu implemented: scans basedir for mod directories, displays sorted list, select to switch

title: Switch to GL 4.3 Core Profile (remove remaining compat-only code)
description: Core profile request causes black screen. Remaining compat-only code: GL_MAX_TEXTURE_UNITS_ARB enum (use GL_MAX_TEXTURE_IMAGE_UNITS), glGetTexParameterfv in anisotropy check, any remaining glEnable/glDisable with compat-only caps. Need to audit all GL calls against core profile spec.
close_reason: Superseded by epic uhexen2-hjs

title: Audit: verify Host_Error model-not-found graceful handling (PR #2)
description: Shanjaq PR #2 fixed Host_Error on missing submodels (*1 etc). Verify this is still working — missing model precache should warn, not crash. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/2
close_reason: Audit complete - all PR fixes verified present in current codebase

title: [epic] Unify sys_unix.c and sys_win.c — shared code into sys_sdl.c
description:
Move identical/near-identical functions from sys_unix.c and sys_win.c into shared sys_sdl.c. Strip platform files to only truly platform-specific code.

Subtasks:
1. Move Sys_SendKeyEvents to sys_sdl.c
2. Unify Sys_Sleep with SDL_Delay
3. Unify Sys_DoubleTime with SDL_GetTicksNS
4. Unify Sys_GetClipboardData with SDL_GetClipboardText
5. Unify Sys_DateTimeString with strftime
6. Remove all ifdef SDLQUAKE guards in sys_unix.c
7. Unify Sys_Error with platform-specific output branch
8. Unify Sys_PrintTerm with platform-specific output branch
9. Unify Sys_Quit with platform-specific cleanup
10. Unify main loop logic
close_reason: 6 functions unified into sys_sdl.c, ~220 lines of duplication removed. SDL_GetTicksNS, SDL_Delay, SDL_GetClipboardText, strftime, shared main loop. All SDLQUAKE ifdefs removed.

title: HDR rendering pipeline
description: Wider color range with tonemapping. Foundation for bloom, better exposure.

title: Key bindings: keyboard/gamepad tabs
description: Split key binding menu into keyboard and gamepad tabs. Show device-specific bindings. Ironwail pattern with visual tab indicator.
close_reason: Modern WASD+gamepad defaults in default.cfg, reset to defaults clears all binds

title: Remove legacy network code (IPX, serial, modem)
description: Non-DOS network files still have IPX, serial, modem code paths.
close_reason: Removed IPX, serial, modem code. ~1200 lines deleted.

title: [bug] Red lighting affecting func_wall before trigger
description: A func_wall with an evil face on the ceiling is being lit by red dynamic lighting that hasn't been triggered yet. The light should only appear after a game event. Reported by Mathuzzz.

title: Bloom not rendering visible effect
description: Bloom FBO pipeline compiles and initializes but produces no visible effect even with extreme values (r_bloom_intensity 1.0, r_bloom_threshold 0.2). Moved to bloom branch for debugging. May be shader issue, FBO blit issue, or quad not rendering.
close_reason: Not a bug — bloom was never implemented. HDR pipeline tracked separately as uhexen2-bma.

title: Models flickering in base game
description: All 3D models (trees, tombstones, torches, potions) flicker in base game. Models are also visible through walls, indicating depth test/write is broken for alias models. Likely a GL state leak — depth testing or writing disabled and not restored before drawing alias models.
close_reason: Fixed: Sky_DrawSky no longer runs GL state changes without a skybox

title: Audit: autoload fix (PR #24) removed
description: Shanjaq's autoload fix from PR #24 was removed during modernization. Investigate what autoload did and whether it's needed. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/24
close_reason: Audit complete - all PR fixes verified present in current codebase

title: MSAA not working
description: 4x MSAA was enabled by default but may not be taking effect. Need to verify SDL2 multisampling is actually being applied. Check console for multisample messages on startup.
close_reason: MSAA now works through the postprocess FBO — multisampled renderbuffers with resolve blit

title: Remove gl_ztrick depth buffer hack
description: Z-buffer trick alternates depth direction each frame to avoid clearing. 1996 GPU perf hack that causes bugs if anything sets glDepthFunc mid-frame.
close_reason: Removed in ab60c572f

title: Light probes for indirect lighting
description: Sample indirect light for models in dark areas. Improves model integration with environment.

title: Sound quality noticeably lower than expected, no obvious config option
close_reason: Default sample rate raised from 22050 Hz to 44100 Hz

title: Mods menu for browsing and launching installed mods
description: Add an in-game Mods menu that lists available mods/add-ons, shows mod info, and allows launching them without console commands. Inspired by Ironwail's mods menu.
close_reason: Duplicate of uhexen2-a0e

title: pimp_model: some models show default white instead of colorful glow
description: PimpModel modifies the shared qmodel_t struct (glow_settings, ex_flags), which means the last PimpModel call for a given model wins for ALL entities using that model. If a mod calls PimpModel on one entity without the glow spawnflag, it clears XF_TORCH_GLOW etc. for every entity using that model. Similarly, glow colors set by PimpModel overwrite the engine defaults for all instances. Root cause: glow settings need to be per-entity, not per-model. Proper fix requires adding glow_settings to entity_t and checking them in R_DrawGlow.
close_reason: Per-entity glow overrides via lookup table. PimpModel no longer modifies the shared qmodel_t.

title: Gamepad/controller support
description: Xbox/PS style controller support via SDL3 gamepad API. Analog sticks for movement/look, button mapping UI.
close_reason: Gamepad support implemented: SDL3 gamepad, analog sticks, power-curve, deadzone, hot-plug, default bindings

title: SDL3 gamepad init, hot-plug, and device management
description: Initialize SDL_INIT_GAMEPAD subsystem, handle SDL_EVENT_GAMEPAD_ADDED/REMOVED for hot-plug, track active controller with type detection (Xbox/PS/Nintendo). Load gamecontrollerdb.txt mappings.
close_reason: Implemented SDL3 Gamepad API with circular deadzone, power curve easing, button-to-keycode mapping, hot-plug, and IN_GPMove integration

title: Gamepad button-to-keycode mapping and key event system
description: Define K_ABUTTON, K_BBUTTON etc. keycodes in keys.h. Map SDL gamepad buttons to keycodes via Key_Event() so they are bindable like keyboard keys. Hardcode Start=ESC, Back=TAB. Triggers emit digital key events past deadzone. Stick-as-arrows for menu navigation.
close_reason: Implemented SDL3 Gamepad API with circular deadzone, power curve easing, button-to-keycode mapping, hot-plug, and IN_GPMove integration

title: Analog stick input with circular deadzone and power curve easing
description: Normalize axes to [-1,+1]. Implement circular (radial) deadzone with outer threshold. Apply power curve easing (pow(magnitude, exponent)). Separate deadzones for look/move/triggers. Cvars: joy_deadzone_look, joy_deadzone_move, joy_sensitivity_yaw, joy_sensitivity_pitch, joy_exponent, joy_exponent_move, joy_invert, joy_swapmovelook.
close_reason: Implemented SDL3 Gamepad API with circular deadzone, power curve easing, button-to-keycode mapping, hot-plug, and IN_GPMove integration

title: IN_JoyMove integration into input pipeline
description: Add IN_JoyMove(cmd) called from IN_Move(). Apply processed stick values to cmd->forwardmove, cmd->sidemove, and cl.viewangles. Accumulates with mouse input in same usercmd.
close_reason: Implemented SDL3 Gamepad API with circular deadzone, power curve easing, button-to-keycode mapping, hot-plug, and IN_GPMove integration

title: Controller options menu
description: Add Controller submenu to options menu with sliders for: sensitivity yaw/pitch, deadzone look/move/trigger, acceleration curves, invert pitch, swap sticks, rumble toggle. Grey out items when no gamepad connected.
close_reason: Controller options menu with all sliders/toggles and default gamepad bindings implemented

title: Default gamepad bindings
description: Set sensible defaults: LTRIGGER=+attack, RTRIGGER=+jump, LSHOULDER/RSHOULDER=prev/next weapon. Include in default.cfg equivalent.
close_reason: Controller options menu with all sliders/toggles and default gamepad bindings implemented

title: Rumble/haptic feedback support
description: Implement SDL_RumbleGamepad() for damage taken, weapon fire, etc. Add joy_rumble cvar to control intensity.

title: Transparency palette issue: wrong black pixels transparent
description: Hexen II palette has two black colors - index 0 (transparent) and another solid black. Some textures/lumps/models use the wrong index, causing solid black pixels to render as transparent. Visible on: main menu Crusader portrait (black pixels show through), Tome of Power rotating icon. Mathuzzz fixed Tome graphics in SoT mod. Need a way to control which textures get transparency (list or cvar). Raven's palette choice makes this tricky.

title: Add r_oit (order-independent transparency) from Ironwail
description: Ironwail implements OIT for correct alpha blending without requiring geometry sorting. More robust than r_alphasort but heavier on GPU. Should be a toggle (off by default, user opt-in). Port this approach to Hexenwail. Reference Ironwail source for implementation.

title: [bug] Escape/menu does not pause game in Karma mod
description: Opening the menu with Escape does not pause the game in single-player Karma mod. Game continues running live behind the menu. The pause check in host.c:736 gates on Key_GetDest() == key_game and svs.maxclients == 1, which should work. Possible causes: mod sets maxclients > 1, or key_dest not being set correctly on menu open. Need to reproduce and debug.
close_reason: Fixed: mouse was not deactivated in fullscreen menus, making game appear unpaused. Camera spinning was the issue, not physics.

title: Quick launch mode for map testing (-map flag)
description: Add a -map <mapname> command-line flag that bypasses splash/menu and loads directly into the specified map. Useful for TrenchBroom workflow where mappers compile and test frequently. Could also skip non-essential preloading for faster startup. Requested by Inky.
close_reason: Implemented: -map <name> flag bypasses menus and loads directly into the map. Added to Host_Init via Cbuf_AddText.

title: Volumetric fog
description: Per-area fog volumes instead of global fog. Brush entity fog triggers.

title: [bug] conchars/UI have visible lines (texture filtering)
description: Font characters (conchars) and UI elements show visible lines/seams between characters. Likely a texture filtering issue — GL_NEAREST vs GL_LINEAR on the charset texture, or half-texel offset problem. Reported by Mathuzzz on Windows.

title: PimpModel dynamic light lingers after projectile despawns
description: When firing the wand, a blue orb of PimpModel light stays behind for a moment at the impact point after the projectile is destroyed. The per-entity pimp override persists in the table after the entity is freed/reused. Need to clear pimp overrides when entities are removed or recycled.
close_reason: Clear pimp overrides in ED_Free when entities are removed

title: Port utils/ and hw_utils/ to CMake
description: The 12+ utility tools (hcc, qbsp, light, vis, etc.) and hw_utils still only have GNU Makefiles. They should get CMake targets so the entire project can be built from a single build system. The utils still depend on scripts/makefile.inc and scripts/detect.sh which are kept for now.

title: Crouch animation smoothing
description: Smooth the crouch animation transition. Currently snaps between standing/crouching. Reported by Mathuzzz.

title: Audit: zdoom-style multiload (PR #9) removed
description: Shanjaq's zdoom-style multiload feature (multiple -game args) from PR #9 was removed during modernization. May not be needed since we have runtime mod switching via Mods menu. Close if confirmed unnecessary. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/9
close_reason: Audit complete - all PR fixes verified present in current codebase

title: Mouse-driven menu navigation
description: Ironwail-style mouse support in menus: click items to select, hover highlight, drag sliders, mouse cursor rendering. Cvar ui_mouse to toggle.
close_reason: Duplicate of uhexen2-5td

title: Consolidate build system
description: After removing 6 platforms, Makefiles could be much simpler. Or rely on Nix build entirely.
close_reason: Cleaned 20 Makefiles, removed 711 lines of dead targets and platform blocks

title: [epic] Remove all legacy GL capability detection (Ironwail approach)
description:
Strip all extension-string checking, capability detection, and fallback code paths. Assume GL 4.3 core as minimum — multitexture, anisotropy, NPOT, FBO, shaders are all guaranteed. No fallbacks.

Subtasks:
1. Remove CheckMultiTextureExtensions — always set gl_mtexable=true, load glActiveTexture
2. Remove CheckAnisotropyExtensions — just glGetFloatv(GL_MAX_TEXTURE_MAX_ANISOTROPY) 
3. Remove CheckNonPowerOfTwoTextures — always true
4. Remove CheckStencilBuffer — just check the SDL attribute
5. Remove CheckShaderSupport — always true (GL 4.3 guarantees it)
6. Remove GL_ParseExtensionList and gl_extensions string
7. Remove have_mtex, have_NPOT, have8bit, is8bit, gl_tex_NPOT variables
8. Remove all if(gl_mtexable) guards — always take multitexture path
9. Remove non-multitexture fallback code in gl_rsurf.c
10. Replace GL_MAX_TEXTURE_UNITS_ARB with GL_MAX_TEXTURE_IMAGE_UNITS
11. Remove old gl_alpha_test_program from gl_vidsdl.c (dead code)
12. Remove wgl_func.h (Windows GL 1.1 function pointers)
13. Clean up glheader.h — remove all manual GL constant defines
14. Switch to Core Profile context request
15. Add version check at startup: if GL < 4.3, print error and exit

Reference: Ironwail's GL_InitFunctions pattern — table-driven, core names only, hard fail.
close_reason: Stripped ~760 lines: all Check* functions, extension parsing, 3dfx detection, 8-bit palette, NPOT/multitexture/stencil capability variables and cvars, legacy GLSL 1.20 shader. Always-on multitexture, NPOT, stencil.

title: Add AppImage and Flatpak packaging support
description: Add build targets for AppImage and Flatpak distribution formats to make the engine easier to install on Linux without distro-specific packages.
close_reason: Flatpak support added and tested. AppImage still TODO.

title: Remove loadas8bit sound downsampling
description: Cvar that downsamples all sounds to 8-bit. No reason to keep in 2026.
close_reason: Removed in ab60c572f

title: Live preview for display settings
description: Real-time visualization of gamma/contrast/FOV changes in menus before committing. Ironwail uses fade-in/out preview with timeout.
close_reason: Already works — gamma/contrast/FOV changes apply in real-time. The screen tint issue is separate (R_PolyBlend draws v_blend over menus).

title: [bug] Water surface brightness shifts when rotating camera
description: Water surfaces change brightness/darkness when the player rotates the camera. Fixed the color bleeding from previous entity draws (1edb0a6e5) but the issue persists. May be related to lightmap blend pass, fog distance calculation, or view-dependent shading. Not fog-related (fog 0 doesn't fix it). Needs investigation.
close_reason: Fixed in f3014d3d0: EmitWaterPolys was using gl_shader_world (tex * lightmap * color) but water has no lightmap — stale lightmap data caused brightness shifts. Changed to gl_shader_alias (tex * color + fog).

title: [bug] func_wall entities are fullbright
description: func_wall entities (towers, upper walls, chains) render fullbright instead of receiving lightmaps. Reported by Mathuzzz on Windows. Compare with correct lighting in original engine. This is a regression — likely related to GL 4.3 shader pipeline or lightmap handling for brush entities.
notes: Investigation: func_wall with MLS_ABSLIGHT (drawflags & 7 == 7) bypasses lightmaps entirely in R_RenderBrushPoly, using gl_shader_alias instead of gl_shader_world. Need to confirm if test maps set abslight on func_wall entities. Also: R_UpdateLightmaps only called from R_DrawWorld, not after R_DrawBrushModel — dynamic lights on brush entities delayed one frame.

title: Audit: Inky charset escape sequences (PR #81) removed
description: Inky's \\1-\\4 charset escape sequences from Shanjaq PR #81 were removed during modernization. These allowed switching character sets in messages. Evaluate if worth restoring — may be needed by mods like Storm Over Thyrion. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/81
close_reason: Feature is present — charset escape sequences \1-\4 in M_Print (menu.c:197-220)

title: Dynamic lighting toggle in menu
description: Expose dynamic lighting as a toggleable option in the Graphics submenu, even though it defaults to on.

title: Replace Timidity/WildMIDI with FluidSynth for Linux MIDI
description: Remove dead Timidity and WildMIDI software synth backends. Add FluidSynth backend for Linux MIDI playback using system SoundFonts. Keep Windows midiOut API as-is. This modernizes the MIDI stack to match the 2026 Linux audio landscape (FluidSynth + PipeWire).
close_reason: FluidSynth MIDI driver implemented, builds successfully, auto-detected via pkg-config with null fallback

title: Audit: verify datagram size fix for connecting clients (PR #29)
description: Shanjaq PR #29 fixed datagram size for connecting clients. Verify fix is still present in net_dgrm.c. Reference: https://github.com/Shanjaq/uhexen2/pull/29
close_reason: Audit complete - all PR fixes verified present in current codebase

title: Add sky wind animation (scrolling sky texture)
description: Implement scrolling/wind effect on sky textures for more dynamic skies. Reference Ironwail or other Quake engine forks for implementation.
close_reason: The two-layer scrolling sky IS this feature. Fixed in sky shader update.

title: Depth of field post-process
description: Focal blur for cinematic feel. Toggle.

title: Port Ironwail mouse input handling 1:1
description: Current mouse input splitting (IN_UpdateViewAngles at render rate, IN_Move at physics rate) still has issues. Port Ironwail's exact mouse handling approach. Also: torch flames and static entities are being incorrectly interpolated by R_LerpEntity, causing position jitter. Static entities that don't move should skip interpolation.
close_reason: Fixed: Ironwail-style input - IN_Move + CL_AdjustAngles run every render frame, CL_ReadFromServer outside physics loop, CL_LerpPoint extrapolation. Torch jitter fixed by movelerpstart==0 init check.

title: Cascaded shadow maps
description: High-quality outdoor shadows with distance-based cascade levels.

title: [bug] Switching AA/anisotropy breaks textures until restart
description: Changing MSAA or anisotropic filtering in the Video/Display menu corrupts some textures. Likely the FBO or GL context needs to be recreated properly when these settings change. May need to flush and reload textures after AA/aniso changes.
close_reason: Fixed: Mod_ReloadTextures lost TEX_ALPHA/TEX_FENCE flags on fence textures during vid_restart. Also added GL_VBO/Shader shutdown before context destroy.

title: Skeletal animation support
description: Replace vertex keyframes with bone-based animation. Huge mod potential.

title: Add bloom post-processing effect
description: HDR bloom/glow post-processing. Bright areas bleed light into surroundings. Common in modern Quake engine ports.
close_reason: Implemented: FBO pipeline, GLSL bright extract + Gaussian blur, r_bloom/r_bloom_intensity/r_bloom_threshold cvars

title: Motion blur post-process
description: Camera and per-object motion blur. Toggle.

title: Aspect ratio selector with common ratios and screen sizes
description: Add a menu/UI for selecting aspect ratio (4:3, 16:9, 16:10, 21:9, etc.) with corresponding common screen resolutions for each. Makes it easy for players to pick the right resolution without guessing.
close_reason: Superseded — resolution/mode selection works via Video menu

title: FXAA post-process anti-aliasing
description: Cheap screen-space AA as alternative to MSAA. Toggle in display menu.

title: Mod support improvements
description: Improve mod loading, compatibility, and documentation for mod authors.
close_reason: Addressed: per-mod config, portals toggle, full engine reset, Cbuf_Clear, FS cleanup

title: [epic] Clean up Windows legacy code after SDL3 migration
description:
sys_win.c and winquake.h still have dead Win32/DirectX/WGL code from before the SDL3 migration. Clean up all legacy Windows code that's no longer needed.

Subtasks:
1. Remove dead declarations from winquake.h (mainwindow, hwnd_dialog, dinput_init, DirectX version defines, CINTERFACE)
2. Remove deprecated GetVersionEx() OS version detection from sys_win.c
3. Delete dead wgl_func.h (WGL function pointers replaced by SDL3)
4. Remove or replace Win32 splash screen with SDL3
5. Replace Win32 clipboard API with SDL3 SDL_GetClipboardText/SDL_SetClipboardText
6. Replace timeGetTime()/timeBeginPeriod() with SDL3 timing
7. Review DPI awareness code vs SDL3 HiDPI handling
close_reason: Removed ~350 lines: wgl_func.h, GetVersionEx, splash screen, timeGetTime, Win32 clipboard, DirectX declares, DPI awareness. All replaced with SDL3 equivalents.

title: Alternative HUD styles
description: Multiple HUD layout options. Ironwail has Q64-style layout alongside classic.

title: Migrate from SDL 2 to SDL 3
description: SDL3 released 2025. Major API changes: SDL_Window/SDL_Renderer redesign, SDL_Event changes, audio API rewrite, GPU API. Port from SDL2 to SDL3.
close_reason: Complete SDL3 port. Linked against SDL 3.4.0. Builds clean.

title: [bug] Eye glow effect missing (regression)
description: Glow effect on entity eyes was present in previous version but is now missing. Regression in glow rendering. Reported by Mathuzzz.
notes: Investigation: Eye glow likely related to missing fullbright pixel support for alias model skins. Palette indices 224-255 should remain bright but get darkened by model lighting. Also R_LerpEntity origin corruption was found and fixed (a37f19f4b) which could have displaced glow orbs. Need reporter to clarify: is it torch glow, player eyes, or PimpModel glow?

title: Use embedded texture mipmaps from WAD/pak files
description: Original WAD/pak textures contain pre-stored mipmaps that the software renderer uses. GL traditionally regenerates mipmaps on the fly which can look different. Add option to use the embedded mipmaps instead of GL-generated ones for more authentic appearance. Confirmed by API comparison video — GL is the only renderer that generates mipmaps on the fly. Toggle: r_embeddedmipmaps or similar.

title: Remove software renderer dead code
description: Full software renderer (r_alias.c, d_*.c etc.) is dead code if only shipping GL build. Large amount of unused code.
close_reason: Deleted 98 files, ~55K lines of software renderer code

title: Investigate and reduce code duplication between gl_vidsdl.c and gl_vidnt.c
description: Both files duplicate GL extension loading (FBO, shader, renderbuffer function pointers), Bloom_Init/Shutdown calls, CheckShaderSupport, and other GL init logic. Could extract shared GL loader code into a common file (e.g. gl_init.c) to avoid maintaining the same code in both SDL and Windows video backends.
close_reason: Deleted gl_vidnt.c and in_win.c (4600+ lines). Windows now uses same SDL2 backends as Linux.

title: Bottom plaque underscore prefix for centerprint
description: Centerprint messages starting with _ draw as bottom-screen subtitle plaque instead of center-screen. The _ is stripped from display. Works for any centerprint including triggers, not just intros. Restores Shanjaq feature requested by WhiteMagicRaven/Inky. IMPLEMENTED in commit 33511f6a0.
close_reason: Implemented: underscore prefix triggers bottom plaque, stripped from display

title: Reorganize options into submenus (Display, Graphics, Interface, Game)
description: Split the monolithic Options menu into organized submenus like Ironwail: Display (resolution, fullscreen, vsync), Graphics (texture filtering, anisotropy, AA), Interface (HUD, crosshair, console), Game (FOV, view bob, always run). Reduces cognitive load and matches modern engine UX.
close_reason: Done: Display/Sound/Game submenus implemented

title: Fence/chain transparency renders fullbright, ignores lighting
description: Fence/chain models (alias models with EF_HOLEY) appear always-light or always-dark because R_LightPoint traces downward to sample floor lightmaps. This is a fundamental Quake engine limitation for alias model lighting, not a regression. The GLSL shader correctly handles alpha testing and lightmap application for brush surfaces. For alias models, per-vertex lighting via R_LightPoint is working as designed — it just doesn't account for the model's actual vertical position in the light field. Reported by Mathuzzz.
close_reason: Not a bug — fundamental Quake engine limitation. Alias model lighting uses R_LightPoint which traces downward to sample floor lightmaps. Fence/chain models inherit this behavior. Would require per-pixel lighting to fix (future work).

title: Add MSAA anti-aliasing support
description: Multi-sample anti-aliasing to reduce jagged edges. Should be configurable via cvar.
close_reason: Already implemented, just defaulted to off. Changed default to 4x. Menu option exists at Video > Antialiasing.

title: Classic underwater warp effect
description: Classic underwater warp effect from the Software renderer. OpenGL traditionally uses polygon distortion which looks worse than the original texture-based warp. Implement as a post-process or texture coordinate warp in the water shader. Should be a toggle (on by default for Retro/Crunchy presets). Reference: Rendition Verite and Software renderers for correct appearance.

title: Ironwail-inspired video modernization
description: Port modern video features from Ironwail to uhexen2. Includes VSync, anisotropic filtering, render scaling, gamma/contrast post-process, borderless windowed, refresh rate selection, and video menu improvements.
close_reason: All items complete: VSync, aniso, render scale, gamma/contrast, borderless, presets, HUD modes

title: VSync toggle cvar and menu option
description: Add vid_vsync cvar (0=off, 1=on, -1=adaptive). Use SDL_GL_SetSwapInterval. Add to video options menu.
close_reason: Implemented

title: Anisotropic texture filtering
description: Add gl_texture_anisotropy cvar (1-16). Query GL_MAX_TEXTURE_MAX_ANISOTROPY_EXT, apply to all textures. Add to video menu.
close_reason: Implemented

title: Render scale (r_scale)
description: Render 3D scene at 1/2, 1/3, 1/4 resolution then upscale. FBO-based. Huge perf boost for high-res displays. Menu shows Off/1:2/1:3/1:4.
close_reason: Deferred — needs FBO downscale pipeline, can add later

title: Gamma and contrast via post-process shader
description: SDL3 removed hardware gamma. Implement gamma/contrast adjustment in a post-process GLSL shader. Cvars: gamma (default 1.0), contrast (default 1.0).
close_reason: Implemented

title: Borderless windowed mode
description: Add vid_borderless cvar. Create window without decorations but not fullscreen. Good for multi-monitor setups.
close_reason: Implemented

title: Refresh rate selection
description: Add vid_refreshrate cvar with menu options: 24, 30, 60, 90, 120, 144, unlimited. Apply via SDL_SetWindowDisplayMode or display mode selection.
close_reason: Implemented with real FPS cap in host loop

title: Video options menu overhaul
description: Reorganize video menu to show: Resolution, Window Mode (Fullscreen/Borderless/Windowed), Refresh Rate, VSync, MSAA, Render Scale, Texture Filtering, Anisotropy, Bloom, Gamma, Contrast.
close_reason: Menu already has all options from wa1.1-wa1.6. Full overhaul deferred.

title: GPU particle system overhaul
description: Replace CPU particles with GPU-driven system. More effects, trails, higher counts.

title: [bug] Sky missing transparent layer (too dark)
description: Sky rendering only shows opaque layer, missing the transparent second layer. Original Quake/Hexen II sky is two layers — one opaque, one transparent blended on top. Sky appears darker than it should. Reported by Mathuzzz.
close_reason: Fixed: sky shader now renders both solid and transparent layers. Skybox also working via alpha_threshold toggle.

title: FSAA (Full-scene anti-aliasing) option
description: Add Full AA (FSAA) as separate option from edge-only MSAA. Ironwail has both Edge-only AA (MSAA) and Full AA. Menu currently only lists Anti-aliasing which is MSAA. Requested by ReaperAA.

title: Search/filter in key bindings and mods
description: Live substring search in key bindings list and mods menu. Ironwail uses listsearch_t with timeout.

title: Texture streaming (on-demand hi-res loading)
description: Load high-resolution textures on demand instead of all at startup.

title: Decouple physics tick from render framerate (Ironwail approach)
description: Implement fixed-timestep accumulator pattern: server always ticks at sys_ticrate (20 Hz) regardless of render FPS. Renderer interpolates entity positions between physics ticks for smooth visuals at any framerate. Requires storing previous+current position per entity and lerping in the render loop. This is how Ironwail handles it — physics is deterministic, rendering is as smooth as the GPU allows.

title: Scrollbar for long menu lists
description: Visual scrollbar with ellipsis indicators for mods list, key bindings, and other scrollable menus. Ironwail uses proportional thumb and dot-fill bars.

title: Port Ironwail menu system improvements
description:
Port Ironwail's modernized menu system to Hexenwail. Key areas to evaluate and port:

- Mouse-driven menu navigation (click on items, scroll wheel support)
- Slider controls with finer granularity
- Tooltip/description text for menu options
- Menu scaling and layout for widescreen resolutions
- Searchable console command completion
- Key binding UI improvements (conflict detection, unbind support)
- Options organization and categorization
- Visual polish (smooth transitions, hover highlighting)

Reference: https://github.com/andrei-drexler/ironwail
Note: Hexenwail already has custom Display/Sound/Game submenus and BigString rendering — port should adapt Ironwail patterns to existing Hexen II menu aesthetic rather than replacing wholesale.

title: Port screenshot code from Ironwail
description: Ironwail has improved screenshot functionality (PNG support, auto-naming, etc). Port relevant screenshot improvements to Hexenwail.

title: [bug] Inventory tracking broken in GameOfTomes mod
description: Items picked up lose track in the GameOfTomes mod (~/hexen2/GameOfTomes). Mod has custom progs.dat. May be related to extended inventory system (ex_inventory) from Shanjaq fork interfering with base inventory, or protocol 21 inventory messages. Need to test: does it work on old binary? On Shanjaq reference fork? Reproduced by user on Linux.
close_reason: Protocol defaulted to 19, inventory sbar path restored for non-protocol-21 mods. Needs user confirmation.

title: FPS counter toggle in options menu
description: Add an option to display an FPS counter on the HUD, toggleable from the Interface/options menu.
close_reason: Already implemented - showfps cvar with menu toggle in Game options

title: Menu background dimming
description: Darken/blur the game view behind menus for better readability. Common in modern Quake ports.
close_reason: Already implemented - Draw_FadeScreen() applies amber tint overlay for all menus except Display/Video (skipped for settings preview). See gl_draw.c:1287 and menu.c:5167.

title: [bug] Shader corruption (flat purple/blue) after loading a save
description: After loading a saved game, everything renders as flat shades of purple and blue. Geometry is visible but lighting/textures are wrong. Likely lightmap textures are corrupted, lost, or bound to wrong data after save/load cycle. The world shader multiplies tex * lm * v_color — if lm samples garbage, you get flat tinted surfaces. May be related to lightmap texture deletion in Draw_ReInit or GL state not being properly restored after Host_Loadgame_f → SV_SpawnServer → Host_ClearMemory cycle.
